mission.title: cilium: k8s: allow setting multiple k8s API server addresses
mission.description:
See commit message for detailed description

Introduce a new command line parameter(`--k8s-api-server-urls`) and helm option(`k8s.apiServerURLs`) to specify multiple k8s API server addresses for the client to use.

Fixes: #19038 

```release-note
Allow setting of multiple k8s API server URLs for client
```

resolution.summary: @fristonio Welcome back! :sweat_smile: Would it be possible to set the new param from Helm? Currently, we use this hack to pass the API server endpoint addr - https://github.com/cilium/cilium/blob/master/install/kubernetes/cilium/templates/cilium-agent/daemonset.yaml#L193.
steps: Review the issue discussion for context
Apply the fix from the linked pull request
codeSnippets:
@fristonio Welcome back! :sweat_smile: Would it be possible to set the new param from Helm? Currently, we use this hack to pass the API server endpoint addr - https://github.com/cilium/cilium/blob/master/install/kubernetes/cilium/templates/cilium-agent/daemonset.yaml#L193.
Hey @brb 👋 
Its good to be back. 😄 
Yeah, I have some changes locally for the helm option that I need to test. Will update the PR soon.
/test
Hey @qmonnet! 👋 
Yeah, changing the CLI flag to use `urls` instead of `addresses` makes sense to me.
I have updated the PR and addressed the changes you requested. 
/test
